note: Desired DNS state for docs (ADR-002). Observed public DNS may still point at GitHub Pages until PR9 cutover. This file is SSOT for verify ladder expectations — not a claim that cutover has happened.

records.comment: Plesk public IPv4 (same as subactor.com / prototypowanie.pl panel host). Confirmed 2026-07-18 via dig A subactor.com.

observed_public.interpretation: GitHub Pages — expected pre-PR9. Public publish-verify must fail (dns_mismatch / tls_san_mismatch).

observed_origin.https_root: 200 but body is prototypowanie.pl WordPress (default/primary vhost) — not docs tree
observed_origin.interpretation: docs.subactor.com addon/docroot missing on Plesk (or not bound). Origin deploy + fingerprint DoD blocked until addon exists.

docs.subactor.com.observed_note: As of PR8/PR9 continuation, public docs.subactor.com resolves to GitHub Pages — do not report publish success from public DNS alone. Do not flip DNS while origin Host serves wrong site.

staging.purpose: Recommended origin/public rehearsal path before production cutover.

observed_public.interpretation: Also on GitHub Pages today — not a Plesk rehearsal target until addon + DNS created.

staging.blocker: needs_human: create Plesk addon docs-stage.subactor.com (separate docroot) before staging DNS.

dns_emergency.note: HITL only; restores Pages, not previous Plesk release. TLS SAN still wrong for docs.subactor.com.

content.note: Only after a prior Plesk release exists; none observed on origin for docs hostname.

needs_human: Create Plesk addon domain docs.subactor.com with dedicated docroot (not primary /httpdocs of prototypowanie.pl).
Optionally create docs-stage.subactor.com addon for rehearsal.
Agree cert path (DNS-01 before cutover preferred) for docs.subactor.com SAN.
HITL boundary DNS mutate Pages CNAME → A 217.160.250.222 only after G0–G6 green.
Rebuild/redeploy urirun-node so paramiko is present (live methods probe 2026-07-18: sftp paramiko_missing; ftp ok) — prod publish requires SFTP.
